debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; refine ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; rw [← h4] at h; exact hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 h)
  · constructor
    · intro u v h
      apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 u.2.1 v.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
      have : y ∈ B := hy.1
      rw [← h2] at this
      obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := this
      refine ⟨⟨x, xA, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
      intro h; rw [h, h4] at hy; exact hy.2 rfl
failed_attempts:
by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; apply h1 hx.1 h3; rw [h, h4]
  · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩; rw [← h2] at hy
    have ⟨x, hxA, hxy⟩ := hy.1
    refine ⟨⟨x, hxA, ?_⟩, Subtype.eq hxy⟩
    intro h; apply hy.2; rw [← hxy, h, h4]

by
  rw [equinum_def]
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · have hb : f x ∈ B := by rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
    have hnb : f x ≠ b := by
      intro h; rw [←h4] at h
      exact hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 h)
    exact ⟨hb, hnb⟩
  · constructor
    · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ h
      apply Subtype.eq
      apply h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
      have : y ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact hy.1
      cases this with | intro x hx =>
        cases hx with | intro xa fxy =>
          exists ⟨x, ⟨xa, fun h => hy.2 (by rw [←fxy, h, h4])⟩⟩
          apply Subtype.eq; exact fxy

by
  apply Exists.intro (fun ⟨x, ⟨hxA, hxna⟩⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, 
    ⟨by rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hxA, rfl⟩, 
     by intro h; apply hxna; apply h1 hxA h3; rw [h, h4]⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, _⟩ ⟨y, _⟩ h
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply h1 x.2.1 y.2.1
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨y, ⟨hyB, hynb⟩⟩
    rw [←h2] at hyB
    cases hyB with | intro x hx =>
      cases hx with | intro hxA hxy =>
        exists ⟨x, ⟨hxA, fun h => hynb (by rw [←hxy, h, h4])⟩⟩
        apply Subtype.eq; exact hxy

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; apply h1 _ hx.1 _ h3; rw [h, h4]
  · constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
      apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 _ hx.1 _ hy.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · rintro ⟨y, hy⟩
      rw [← h2] at hy
      rcases hy.1 with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨⟨x, hx, fun h => hy.2 (by rw [h, h4])⟩, rfl⟩

by
  apply Exists.intro (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    have ⟨xA, xna⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
    · intro h; rw [←h4] at h; exact xna (h1 x a xA h3 h)⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ h
    apply Subtype.eq; injection h with h
    exact h1 x1 x2 hx1.1 hx2.1 h
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    have ⟨yB, ynb⟩ := hy
    rw [←h2] at yB
    cases yB with | intro x hx =>
      cases hx with | intro xA fxy =>
        exists ⟨x, xA, fun h => ynb (by rw [←fxy, h, h4])⟩
        apply Subtype.eq; exact fxy

by
  exists fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    rw [←h2]; constructor
    · exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; apply h1 hx.1 h3; rw [h, h4]⟩
  constructor
  · intros x y h; apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · rintro ⟨y, hyB, hyb⟩
    rw [←h2] at hyB; cases hyB with | intro x hx =>
    cases hx with | intro hxA hxy =>
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun h => hyb (by rw [←hxy, h, h4])⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact hxy

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    have ⟨hxA, hna⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hxA, rfl⟩
    · intro hfb; apply hna; apply h1 hxA h3; rw [hfb, h4]⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ heq
    apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    have : y ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact hy.1
    cases this with | intro x h =>
      cases h with | intro hxA hfx =>
        exists ⟨x, ⟨hxA, fun h => hy.2 (by rw [←hfx, h, h4])⟩⟩
        apply Subtype.eq; exact hfx

by
  let F : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, by
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; exact hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩
  exists F
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
    apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 hx.1 hy.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ hy.1 : ∃ x ∈ A, f x = y) with ⟨x, xa, rfl⟩
    have xna : x ≠ a := fun h ↦ hy.2 (h ▸ h4)
    exists ⟨x, ⟨xa, xna⟩⟩; apply Subtype.eq; rfl

by
  apply equinum_def.mpr
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp at hx ⊢; constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exists x, hx.1
    · intro h; rw [← h4] at h; exact hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 h)
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h; simp at h
    apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 hx.1 hy.1 h
  · rintro ⟨y, hy⟩; simp at hy
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := by rw [← h2] at hy; exact hy.1
    refine ⟨⟨x, hx, ?_⟩, Subtype.eq rfl⟩
    intro h; rw [h, h4] at hy; exact hy.2 rfl

by
  refine ⟨λ x => ⟨f x.1, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · rcases x.2 with ⟨hxA, hxna⟩
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; refine ⟨x.1, hxA, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hxna; apply h1 hxA h3; rw [h, ←h4]
  · constructor
    · intros x y h; apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · rintro ⟨y, hyB, hynb⟩
      rw [←h2] at hyB; rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨⟨x, hxA, λ h => hynb (by rw [h, h4])⟩, ?_⟩
      apply Subtype.eq; rfl

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, by
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; rw [← h4] at h; exact h1 hx.1 h3 h⟩, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hyB, hynb⟩
    rw [← h2] at hyB; cases hyB with | intro x h =>
    cases h with | intro hxA hfx =>
    refine ⟨⟨x, hxA, fun h ↦ hynb (by rw [← hfx, h, h4])⟩, ?_⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact hfx

by
  apply Exists.intro (fun ⟨x, ⟨hxA, hxna⟩⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x, hxA; rfl
    · intro h; exact hxna (h1 hxA h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro ⟨x, _⟩ ⟨y, _⟩ h; apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 x.property.1 y.property.1
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨y, ⟨hyB, hynb⟩⟩
    rw [←h2] at hyB; cases hyB with | intro x hx =>
    exists ⟨x, hx.1, fun h => hynb (hx.2 ▸ h ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact hx.2

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; exact hx.2 (h1 x hx.1 a h3 (h.trans h4.symm))
  · constructor
    · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq
      exact h1 x.1 x.2.1 y.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · rintro ⟨y, hyB, hynb⟩
      rw [← h2] at hyB; rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨⟨x, hxA, fun h => hynb (by rw [h, h4])⟩, Subtype.eq rfl⟩

by
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ =>
    ⟨f x, by
      have xA : x ∈ A := hx.1
      have xna : x ≠ a := hx.2
      rw [←h2]
      apply And.intro
      · exists x; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
      · intro hfb
        have : f x = f a := by rw [hfb, h4]
        have : x = a := h1 xA h3 this
        contradiction⟩
  exists g
  apply And.intro
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ heq
    apply Subtype.eq
    have : f x1 = f x2 := congr_arg Subtype.val heq
    exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 this
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    have : y ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact hy.1
    cases this with x hx
    cases hx with xA fx_eq_y
    have : x ≠ a := by
      intro xa
      rw [xa, h4] at fx_eq_y
      have : y ≠ b := hy.2
      rw [←fx_eq_y] at this
      contradiction
    exists ⟨x, xA, this⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact fx_eq_y

by
  apply equinum_def.mpr
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · have xA : x ∈ A := hx.1
    have xna : x ≠ a := hx.2
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply xna; apply h1 x a xA h3; rw [h, h4]
  · constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
      simp at h
      apply Subtype.eq
      exact h1 x y hx.1 hy.1 h
    · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
      have yB : y ∈ B := hy.1
      rw [←h2] at yB
      cases yB with | intro x hx =>
      exists ⟨x, ⟨hx.1, fun h => hy.2 (by rw [←hx.2, h, h4])⟩⟩
      simp; exact hx.2

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    have ⟨xa, xne⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨xa, rfl⟩
    · rw [←h4]; intro feq; apply xne; exact h1 xa h3 feq⟩)
  constructor
  · intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 x.2.1 y.2.1; exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    have : y ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact hy.1
    cases this with x hx; cases hx with xa fxy
    exists ⟨x, ⟨xa, by intro xeq; rw [xeq, h4] at fxy; exact hy.2 fxy⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact fxy

by
  let g (x : ↑(A \ {a})) : ↑(B \ {b}) := ⟨f x.1, by
    have xA : x.1 ∈ A := x.2.1
    have xna : x.1 ≠ a := x.2.2
    rw [← h2]; constructor
    · exists x.1; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
    · rw [← h4]; intro h; exact xna (h1 xA h3 h)⟩
  exists g; constructor
  · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩; rw [← h2] at hy
    cases hy.1 with | intro x hx =>
      cases hx with | intro hxA hfx =>
        have xna : x ≠ a := λ h ↦ hy.2 (by rw [← hfx, h, h4])
        exists ⟨x, hxA, xna⟩; apply Subtype.eq; exact hfx

by
  have H : ∀ x, x ∈ A \ {a} → f x ∈ B \ {b} := fun x hx ↦
    ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩, fun h ↦ hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 (by rw [h, ←h4]))⟩
  exists fun p ↦ ⟨f p.1, H p.1 p.2⟩
  constructor
  · intro p1 p2 h
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact h1 p1.2.1 p2.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    have : y ∈ image f A := h2 ▸ hy.1
    cases this with | intro x hx =>
      exists ⟨x, hx.1, fun h ↦ hy.2 (by rw [←hx.2, h, h4])⟩
      apply Subtype.eq
      exact hx.2

  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨xA, xna⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
    · intro h; rw [←h4] at h; exact xna (h1 _ xA _ h3 h)
  · constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h; apply Subtype.eq; injection h with h
      exact h1 _ hx.1 _ hy.1 h
    · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
      obtain ⟨yB, ynb⟩ := hy
      rw [←h2] at yB
      obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := yB
      refine ⟨⟨x, xA, fun h => ynb (by rw [h, h4])⟩, rfl⟩

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, by
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; rw [mem_singleton_iff]; apply h1 hx.1 h3; rw [h4, h]⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
    apply Subtype.eq; injection h with h; exact h1 hx.1 hy.1 h
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ : ∃ x ∈ A, f x = y := by rw [←h2] at hy; exact hy.1
    refine ⟨⟨x, ⟨hx, ?_⟩⟩, Subtype.eq rfl⟩
    intro h; rw [mem_singleton_iff] at h; subst h; rw [h4] at hy; exact hy.2 rfl

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · have ⟨xA, xna⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [←h2]; apply Exists.intro x; exact ⟨xA, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply xna; apply h1 xA h3; rw [h, h4]
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
    have : x = y := h1 hx.1 hy.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)

    have ⟨xA, feq⟩ := hx

    rw [feq]

      rw [← h2] at this
      obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := this
      refine ⟨⟨x, xA, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
      intro h; rw [h, h4] at hy; exact hy.2 rfl

by
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ 
    ⟨f x, by
      constructor
      · rw [←h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
      · intro h; apply hx.2; apply h1
        · exact hx.1
        · exact h3
        · exact h.trans h4.symm⟩
  exists g
  constructor
  · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq; apply h1
    · exact x.2.1
    · exact y.2.1
    · exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨y, yB, ynb⟩
    rw [←h2] at yB
    cases yB with | intro x h =>
    cases h with | intro xA fxy =>
    exists ⟨x, xA, fun eq ↦ ynb (fxy ▸ eq ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact fxy

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨xa, xna⟩ := hx
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, xa, rfl⟩
    · intro h; rw [← h4] at h; exact xna (h1 xa h3 h)
  · constructor
    · intros x y h
      apply Subtype.eq
      exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · intro ⟨y, ⟨yb, ynb⟩⟩
      rw [← h2] at yb
      obtain ⟨x, xa, rfl⟩ := yb
      refine ⟨⟨x, ⟨xa, ?_⟩⟩, rfl⟩
      intro h; rw [h, h4] at ynb; contradiction

by
  refine ⟨λ ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exists x; exact ⟨hx.1, rfl⟩
    · intro h; apply hx.2; apply h1 hx.1 h3; rw [h4, h]
  · constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h
      apply Subtype.eq; apply h1 hx.1 hy.1; exact congrArg Subtype.val h
    · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
      have : y ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact hy.1
      cases this with | intro x hx =>
      cases hx with | intro xA yfx =>
      have xna : x ≠ a := by intro h; rw [h, h4] at yfx; rw [← yfx] at hy; exact hy.2 rfl
      exists ⟨x, xA, xna⟩; apply Subtype.eq; exact yfx

by
  refine ⟨fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    · rw [← h4]; intro h; exact hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 h)
  · constructor
    · intros x y h; apply Subtype.eq; exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · rintro ⟨y, hyB, hynb⟩
      rw [← h2] at hyB; rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨⟨x, hxA, λ h ↦ hynb (h ▸ h4)⟩, rfl⟩

by
  refine ⟨λ ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨f x, by
      refine ⟨by rw [←h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩, λ h => hx.2 ?_⟩
      rw [h1 hx.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm)]; rfl⟩, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩ ⟨y, hy⟩ h; simp at h
    exact Subtype.eq (h1 hx.1 hy.1 h)
  · intro ⟨y, yB, ynb⟩
    rcases (by rw [←h2] at yB; exact yB) with ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨⟨x, xA, λ h => ynb (by rw [h, h4]; rfl)⟩, rfl⟩
